arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney back in for Arsenal but Mikel Arteta still ends up delivering brutal putdown
arts.sum: Tierney could make his first Gunners appearance in 16 months with players missing for Monaco Champions League clash

arts.ttl: Arsenal set to recall forgotten man despite Mikel Arteta's long-held reservations
arts.sum: Kieran Tierney could make a shock return for Arsenal against Monaco in the Champions League on Wednesday night because of Mikel Arteta's long list of injured defenders

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta puzzled by Arsenal's nightmare injury scenario - "We're trying to cope"
arts.sum: Arsenal face Monaco in the Champions League tonight with up to seven defenders missing but Mikel Arteta has taken on an air of acceptance following cruel run of injuries

arts.ttl: Arsenal to sell Jesus in January? Arteta responds to rumour
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has rubbished reports that Arsenal could sell Gabriel Jesus in January. Ahead of Arsenal's Champions League clash with Monaco, manager Mikel Arteta was quizzed about Jesus' future and role in the team and he made sure to brand any exit rumours as pure 'nonsense.'

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho urges Nico Williams to brutally snub Arsenal in favour of £60m transfer
arts.sum: But former Tottenham and Chelsea manager Jose Mourinho has now admitted he is hoping Williams turns down any potential move to Arsenal in favour of former club Real Madrid. The 22-year-old was linked with a move to the Gunners over the summer after impressing for Athletic Club last season and with Spain at Euro 2024.

arts.ttl: Man City's full list of FFP charges as Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham await outcome
arts.sum: 1. In respect of each of Seasons 2009/10 to 2017/18 inclusive, the Premier League Rules applicable in those seasons that required provision by a member club to the Premier League, in the utmost good faith, of accurate financial information that gives a true and fair view of the club’s financial position, in particular with respect to its revenue (including sponsorship revenue), its related parties and its operating costs, namely: (a) each of Seasons 2009/10 to 2012/13 inclusive, the Premier League Rules applicable in those Seasons requiring a member club to include full details of manager remuneration in its relevant contracts with its manager, namely:

arts.ttl: Arsenal target Benjamin Sesko is hailed as 'the BEST' striker RB Leipzig team-mate has played with
arts.sum: The Slovenian No9 was considered a major target for Arsenal and Chelsea ahead of the summer transfer window as both top-flight sides sought to sharpen their attacking ranks.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Monaco preview: Gunners facing defensive injury crisis
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta’s side fell at the quarter-final stage in the Champions League last season after they came unstuck against Bayern Munich, but Odegaard believes they are ready to go all the way and deliver their first ever Champions League title. We believe in what we do and hopefully this can be the year.”

arts.ttl: Arsenal can land double Man Utd transfer blow and prove Ineos wrong again
arts.sum: It is going to be an interesting summer at the Emirates Stadium as Arsenal look to make changes and give Mikel Arteta the squad to overhaul Manchester City and win the Premier League title. Arsenal have rarely looked further away from Manchester United than they do under Mikel Arteta .

arts.ttl: Monaco’s Folarin Balogun to undergo shoulder surgery
arts.sum: AS Monaco’s Folarin Balogun (23) will undergo an operation on his shoulder issue, Adi Hütter has revealed in a pre-match press conference, attended by Get French Football News. Balogun recently returned…
